description: The CT Cranium DICOM scan is already loaded in InVesalius 3. Create a composite 3D visualization for surgical planning that shows the bone structure inside the soft tissue. The bone surface must be fully opaque, and the skin/soft-tissue surface must be semi-transparent to allow the bone to be visible through it. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/skin_bone_overlay.inv3. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
